docs.title: OS CLI
docs.text: A CLI built for All Operating Systems, built from batch, converted to sh.

docs.title: What is OS CLI?
docs.text: OS ClI is a CLI that is built from batch and meant to be available to everyone. Founded in 2026 by Cirtwitz, it includes many different packages in it.

docs.title: Batch files on UNIX
docs.text: Well, you can't run batch files on unix/linux devices. So, it has been converted to bash. Ending with .sh unlike batch. Which end in .bat.
